calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re: Dismissal
Off Calendar Sep-18-2023 Off Calendar

Verified Petition For: 1) Order For Accounting; 2) Order For Damages, Attorney'S Fees And Costs For Failure To Timely Provide Notice Of Trust Under Pc
Off Calendar Sep-18-2023 Off Calendar

Verified Petition For: 1) Order For Accounting; 2) Order For Damages, Attorney'S Fees And Costs For Failure To Timely Provide Notice Of Trust Under Pc
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Continued To Sep-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Lowe, Esq., via Zoom, for Joseph Ong, Petitioner; Robert Camors, Esq., via CourtCall, for Michael Ong and Kevin Ong, Respondents.

Mr. Lowe reports that his client has signed a settlement agreement and that the parties are requesting a continuance of 60-90 days to finalize the settlement. Mr. Camors agrees with Mr. Lowe's report.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Sep-18-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. A Status hearing RE: Dismissal is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Verified Petition For: 1) Order For Accounting; 2) Order For Damages, Attorney'S Fees And Costs For Failure To Timely Provide Notice Of Trust Under Pc
Off Calendar Apr-17-2023 Continued To Jun-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Loew appeared by zoom for Joseph Ong (petitioner).
Joseph Gruber appeared by zoom for Anne Lassahn (trustee).
Robert Camros appeared by courtcall for Michael Ong and Kevin Ong (respondents).

Mr. Loew stated that they reached a settlement agreement, that it is not yet signed, and that it is a matter of formalizing the settlement agreement. Mr. Camros and Gruber agree with Mr. Loew's representation. Mr. Camros stated that he will be asking for the court's approval of the settlement agreement. The First Amended Petition for Order for Accounting, etc. is continued to June 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status of mediation is off calendar. The parties will be filing a petition for approval of the settlement agreement.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Apr-17-2023 Off Calendar

Verified Petition For: 1) Order For Accounting; 2) Order For Damages, Attorney'S Fees And Costs For Failure To Timely Provide Notice Of Trust Under Pc
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Continued To Apr-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Lowe, via Zoom, for Joseph Ong, Petitioner; Robert Camors, via CourtCall, for Kevin and Michael Ong, Respondents; Juliette Nguyen, via Zoom, for Anne Lassahn, Trustee.

At the query of the court, Messrs. Camors and Lowe report as to the status of discovery and that the parties have discussed mediation but that it would help to complete additional discovery prior to participating in settlement discussions. Mr. Camors suggests a continuance to April of 2023. Mr. Lowe agrees. Ms. Nguyen reports that her client continues to work on marshalling assets.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Apr-17-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Status of Mediation is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Verified Petition For: 1) Order For Accounting; 2) Order For Damages, Attorney'S Fees And Costs For Failure To Timely Provide Notice Of Trust Under Pc
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Continued To Dec-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Freeland, via Zoom, for Joseph Ong, Petitioner; Robert Camors, via Zoom, for Kevin and Michael Ong, Respondents; Juliette Nguyen, via Zoom, for Anne T. Lassahn, Trustee.

Ms. Freeland reports on the status of this matter and that there is a deposition of the trust's drafting attorney scheduled for October and requests a continuance to Dec-19-2022 accordingly. The court offers the parties a referral to pro bono mediation. Counsel offers their respective, current positions regarding settlement discussions. Mr. Camors advises that the core argument of the petition is that the trust should be invalidated and asks if the next calling of this matter will be an evidentiary hearing. The court advises that it will not be an evidentiary hearing and summarizes what may take place at the next calling of this matter. The court advises counsel that it will not order the parties to pro bono mediation at this time but instructs the parties to file papers if they wish to be ordered to mediation prior to the next hearing date.

The subject matter is continued to Dec-19-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Verified Petition For: 1) Order For Accounting; 2) Order For Damages, Attorney'S Fees And Costs For Failure To Timely Provide Notice Of Trust Under Pc
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Continued To Sep-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For: 1) Order For Accounting; 2) Order For Damages, Attorney'S Fees And Costs For Failure To Timely Provide Notice Of Trust Under Pc
Off Calendar Jun-22-2022 Continued To Aug-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

General Demurrer
Off Calendar Jun-08-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Lowe, via Zoom, for Jospeh Ong, Petitioner; Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Michael Ong and Kevin Ong, Objectors.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the General Demurrer. At the conclusion of argument, the court adopts its tentative ruling.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Examiner: Elif Sonmez-Kirsch. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
